function: Passing Query Results to a Script
sql_array: CREATE TABLE hackernews (id UInt64, comment String);
INSERT INTO hackernews VALUES (1, 'This is a test.'), (2, 'Another comment!'), (3, NULL), (4, '');

SELECT * FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews WHERE id >= (SELECT MAX(id) FROM hackernews WHERE comment IS NOT NULL) OR comment = '' LIMIT 10));
SELECT id, sentiment FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews WHERE LENGTH(comment) >= 5 AND comment != '' AND id <= 5));
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews) AS subquery WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hackernews WHERE id >= 1 OR comment IS NULL);
SELECT * FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE number >= (SELECT MIN(number) FROM test_numbers WHERE number IS NOT NULL)));
CREATE TABLE comments_analysis AS (SELECT comment, COUNT(*) AS count FROM hackernews GROUP BY comment HAVING count >= 1) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT * FROM comments_analysis WHERE count >= (SELECT AVG(count) FROM comments_analysis) AND count IS NOT NULL;

SELECT * FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM hackernews WHERE comment IS NULL) OR comment NOT LIKE '%test%' LIMIT 5));
